items.name: Server Reboot
items.description:
Service Overview:

 

Please use the form below to request a server reboot. Please be aware that reboots of production servers may require additional documentation.

variables.name: reboot_date
variables.question_text: Desired date and time of reboot

items.name: Database Restore
items.description: Please fill in the information below to request a restore of a database. Please be aware that restores of a production instance will require additional approvals.

variables.name: restore_pit
variables.question_text: Restore from this point in time

items.name: Request Knowledge Base
items.description: Here you can request a new Knowledge Base to be used. A Knowledge Base can be used to store Knowledge in an organization and anyone can request for a new one to be created.

variables.name: request_reason
variables.question_text: What is the reason for this Knowledge Base to be created?

variables.name: requested_title
variables.question_text: What is the name of the Knowledge Base?

items.name: Application Server (Standard)
items.description:
Corporate application server

Standard Default configuration includes:

  • 4GB RAM
  • 2 X 70G SCSI drives (Raid 0)
  • Up to 250G of SAN storage (specify)
  • Linux or Windows XP (specify)

Recommended Use: Application or Web server

variables.name: project_code
variables.question_text: Which project code is this server to be billed to?

variables.name: budget_code
variables.question_text: What budget code should this server be billed to?

variables.name: san
variables.question_text: How much (if any) SAN Storage is required?

items.name: Application Server (Large)
items.description:
Corporate application server (Large)

Default configuration includes:

  • 16GB RAM
  • 2 X 70G SCSI drives (Raid 0)
  • Up to 500G of SAN storage (specify)
  • Linux or Windows XP (specify)

Recommended Use: Application server for applications with high transaction volume.

variables.name: project_code
variables.question_text: Which project code is this server to be billed to?

variables.name: budget_code
variables.question_text: What budget code should this server be billed to?

variables.name: san
variables.question_text: How much (if any) SAN Storage is required?

items.name: Database Server & Oracle License
items.description:
• Corporate database server (Standard)

    • Default configuration includes:
    • 64GB RAM
    • 2 X 70G SCSI drives (Raid 0)
    • Up to 1 TB of SAN Storage (specify in request)
    • Linux or Windows XP (specify)
    • Oracle 10g R2

variables.name: project_code
variables.question_text: Which project code is this server to be billed to?

variables.name: budget_code
variables.question_text: What budget code should this server be billed to?

variables.name: san
variables.question_text: How much (if any) SAN Storage is required?

items.name: Email Account (old)
items.description:
Services Overview:

Corporate email supports both the outlook client as well as outlook web access (OWA).  This comes pre-installed on all users corporate issued devices.

Services Overview:

  • 24/7 Monitoring
  • End user support

items.name: VM Provisioning
items.description:
This service provides support and administration of a VMware virtual server running a supported Linux server operating system. Configuration changes will be handled as requested.

Services Include:

  • Linux Environment
  • Standard 50 GB of Storage, 4 GB of RAM
  • Additional CPUs, Storage, and RAM available upon request
  • Alerting and Monitoring
